sprints.title: AgentForge v6.4.2 — Git Changed-Files & RuntimeAdapter Wiring

items.title: collectChangedFiles via git diff instead of in-memory tracking
items.description: Replace the in-memory changed-file accumulator with a git diff --name-only call so the PR body and review step see all files touched during the execute phase — including those modified by subprocesses. Commit: 6adcaa1.

items.title: Wire CLI autonomous command through RuntimeAdapter
items.description: Route the CLI autonomous command through RuntimeAdapter so it uses the same AgentRuntime code path as the server, eliminating a duplicate execution branch. Commit: 6adcaa1.

successCriteria: PR body lists real changed files from git diff
CLI autonomous command routes through RuntimeAdapter
